---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment Information
**Desktop:**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 12.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 96, Firefox 94, Safari 15]
- Version: [e.g. 22]

**Mobile:**
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 13, Samsung Galaxy S21]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 15.1, Android 12]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari, Chrome Mobile]
- Version: [e.g. 22]

## Technical Details
**Application Version:** [e.g. 1.2.3]
**Node.js Version:** [e.g. 18.12.0]
**npm Version:** [e.g. 8.19.2]

## Console Errors
If applicable, paste any console errors or logs:
```
Paste console errors here
```

## Network Information
If the bug involves network requests:
- [ ] Issue occurs with slow internet connection
- [ ] Issue occurs with fast internet connection
- [ ] Issue occurs offline
- [ ] Issue is intermittent

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix the bug, please describe them here.

## Related Issues
Link any related issues here:
- #issue_number

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues before creating this one
- [ ] I have provided all the requested information
- [ ] I have tested this on the latest version
- [ ] I have included screenshots/videos if applicable
